effects.text: Strike: dodge, with an optional maneuver.
Strike: dodge, with an optional maneuver.

params.effect: the strike has no effect on this vampire

effects.text: If it's tails, the strike has no effect on this vampire.

params.effect: play only one Gemini's Mirror at superior each combat

effects.text: play only one Gemini's Mirror at superior each combat

Only usable before range is determined. For each strike made against this vampire, flip a coin. If it's tails, the strike has no effect on this vampire. This lasts until heads is flipped or combat ends. A vampire can play only one Gemini's Mirror at superior each combat.
